description: Statement of the expenses of one of the members – 1927CE – August 1938CE – Bassatine Cemetery – Museum of Islamic Art – (number 144) – in Judeo-Arabic. (information from Ḥassanein Muḥammad Rabīʿa, ed., Dalīl Wathā'iq al-Janīza al-Jadīda / Catalogue of the Documents of the New Geniza, 72). MCD.
